messages.content:
Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
When the snow covering James Rhodes's yard melted in the Spring, he found his baseball.
When the snow covering James Rhodes's yard melted in the spring, he found his baseball.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Suprisingly, Aquaman always looks forward to the cold winter weather.
Surprisingly, Aquaman always looks forward to the cold winter weather.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Frida is in charge of buying ice and plastic cups for the Abraham Lincoln Fall Carnival.
Frida is in charge of buying ice and plastic cups for the Abraham Lincoln fall carnival.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Whenever Nick Fury's chemistry teacher sat in the dunking booth at the school's spring Fling, ticket sales were huge.
Whenever Nick Fury's chemistry teacher sat in the dunking booth at the school's Spring Fling, ticket sales were huge.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Inspired by the jazz musician's story, Deadpool practiced the trombone every day in may.
Inspired by the jazz musician's story, Deadpool practiced the trombone every day in May.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Wolverine wished tomorrow were a Holiday so he wouldn't have to take the test.
Wolverine wished tomorrow were a holiday so he wouldn't have to take the test.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
If new year's day is rainy this year, Black Widow won't be able to host her annual picnic.
If New Year's Day is rainy this year, Black Widow won't be able to host her annual picnic.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
The gym teachers begged Naruto to let them take cinco de mayo off.
The gym teachers begged Naruto to let them take Cinco de Mayo off.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Last friday, Batman bought a huge scarecrow to put in his garden.
Last Friday, Batman bought a huge scarecrow to put in his garden.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
A marching band from Arizona showed up at Dwayne Johnson's groundhog day party.
A marching band from Arizona showed up at Dwayne Johnson's Groundhog Day party.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Vin Diesel found a great costume for the City of New York's autumn Harvest Festival.
Vin Diesel found a great costume for the City of New York's Autumn Harvest Festival.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
When the snow covering Peter Parker's yard melted in the Spring, he found his Frisbee.
When the snow covering Peter Parker's yard melted in the spring, he found his Frisbee.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
During the summer, Tony Stark makes a habit of going swimming every sunday.
During the summer, Tony Stark makes a habit of going swimming every Sunday.
Unless aunt Sue can give them a ride, Tony Stark and his friends will miss the movie.
Unless Aunt Sue can give them a ride, Tony Stark and his friends will miss the movie.
Chris Hemsworth thinks a Captain of a cruise ship has a pretty cool job.
Chris Hemsworth thinks a captain of a cruise ship has a pretty cool job.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Kevin Hart was going to take the bus to madison avenue, but he decided to ride his unicycle there instead.
Kevin Hart was going to take the bus to Madison Avenue, but he decided to ride his unicycle there instead.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.

Captain Marvel had to fly through Mexico on her way home.
